name: starshub
description: StarsHub - GitHub 星标管理 uTools 插件

scripts.release: tsc && vite build && powershell -Command "$d='release'; if(Test-Path $d){Remove-Item $d -Recurse -Force}; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $d|Out-Null; Copy-Item plugin.json,preload.js,logo.png $d; Copy-Item dist "$d\dist" -Recurse; Write-Output 'release 目录已就绪'"
